---
title: "The Perception of Names in Experimental Studies on Ethnic Origin: A Cross-National Validation in Europe"
description: "In this paper, we present the dataset ‘Perceptions of names in Europe’, containing the perceptions of 1078 names studied across nine European countries: Belgium, Czech Republic, Germany, Hungary, Ireland, the Netherlands, Spain, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom."
author:
  - Abel Ghekiere
  - Billie Martiniello
  - Daniel Capistrano 
  - Jeremy Kuhnle
  - Stefanie Sprong 
  - Pelin Atay
  - Héctor Cebolla Boado
  - Mathew Creighton
  - Valentina Di Stasio 
  - Mariña Fernández-Reino 
  - Johanna Hildebrandt
  - Ketevani Kapanadze 
  - Vasilena Lachkovska 
  - Bram Lancee
  - Isabel Lázaro Bueno 
  - Josef Montag
  - Bori Simonovits 
  - Stephanie Steinmetz
  - Ely Strömberg
  - Álvaro Suárez-Vergne 
  - Sanne van Oosten
  - Veronika Vass-Vigh 
  - Susanne Veit
  - Eva Zschirnt  
  - Pieter-Paul Verhaeghe 
date: "2025-11-28T00:00:00Z"
doi: 10.1038/s41597-025-06153-8
image: ./names_sd.png
categories:
  - Immigration
  - Europe
  - Methods
  - Experiment
---

[Full text](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-025-06153-8){.btn .btn-lg .btn-primary}  [Data and Code](https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/YD5QV){.btn .btn-lg .btn-success} [Citation](./names_sd.bib){.btn .btn-lg .btn-info}
